name: io.github.Timwal78/squeezeos
title: SqueezeOS — Institutional AI Market Intelligence
description: Institutional AI market intelligence: squeeze scanner, options flow, council verdicts. x402 RLUSD.

headers.name: X-Payment-Token
headers.description: JWT payment token for premium tools only. Obtain by: (1) call get_invoice with endpoint_id → (2) pay RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base → (3) call verify_payment with tx_hash. Token valid 1 hour. Free tools work without this header.
